$comment: Seed persona roster. 18 roots x 6 facets = 108 public identities. Roots use @seed.facet.social emails (created confirmed via service role; no mail is ever sent) so seed accounts are identifiable and purgeable in one query. 'voice' and 'rooms' drive content generation — a persona only ever posts in its home rooms, in its own voice. activity: high ~ posts/comments most days, med ~ few times/week, low ~ occasional.
